title: Anthropic Just Dropped a Masterclass on Building Agent Harnesses (for Large Codebases)
summary: Cole Medin presents a comprehensive approach called the AI Layer for optimizing Claude Code performance in large codebases. The method emphasizes that the surrounding harness of context, configuration, and tooling matters more than the model itself, and includes components like self-improving hooks, scoped skills, LSP, MCP, and subagents.
